description.p: GradientDiamond draws a square-shaped colour ramp from a centre point.

field.name: CX
field.comment: The horizontal centre point of the gradient.

description.p: The (CX, CY) coordinates define the centre point from which the diamond gradient expands. By default, the centre point is set to 50%.

field.name: CY
field.comment: The vertical centre point of the gradient.

description.p: The (CX, CY) coordinates define the centre point from which the diamond gradient expands. By default, the centre point is set to 50%.
The radius of the diamond gradient can be defined as a fixed unit or scaled relative to its container. A default radius of 50% applies if this field is not set.
